For my threat model: until everyone who wants a vaccine can get one (including under-5s) I prefer to mask in public to prevent inadvertently spreading COVID- I continue to do that every day. I'll get a booster if a variant emerges that affects young/health people differently.

When I got my first shots I was told that being vaccinated would reduce the spread of the virus. As a relatively healthy young adult, my main concern is spreading COVID to immunocompromised or very young children who haven't been vaccinated. Boosters don't help with that. https://t.co/DbAzec7Zi1
